title: Sanger-tol/Variantcalling Workflow

gitGraph TB:
commit id: "START"
branch Fasta order: 4
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_FAIDX"
checkout BAM/CRAM
commit id: "SAMPLESHEET_CHECK"
branch AlignedReads order: 3
branch UnAlignedReads order: 2
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_COLLATE"
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_FASTA"
commit id: "BLAST_BLASTN"
commit id: "PACBIO_FILTER"
commit id: "PACBIO_SAMTOOLS_FILTER"
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_FASTQ"
commit id: "MINIMAP2_ALIGN"
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_MERGE_BY_SAMPLE 1" type: HIGHLIGHT
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_STATS" type: HIGHLIGHT
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_FLAGSTAT" type: HIGHLIGHT
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_IDXSTATS" type: HIGHLIGHT
checkout BAM/CRAM
merge UnAlignedReads
checkout Fasta
branch SplitFasta order: 5
commit id: "FASTA_SPLIT"
branch DeepVariant order: 6
checkout AlignedReads
merge Fasta
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_SORT"
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_MERGE_BY_SAMPLE 2"
checkout BAM/CRAM
merge AlignedReads
commit id: "SAMTOOLS_FILTER"
checkout DeepVariant
merge BAM/CRAM
commit id: "DEEPVARIANT"
commit id: "BCFTOOLS_CONCAT_VCF" type: HIGHLIGHT
branch "VCFtools" order: 7
commit id: "VCFTOOLS_SITE_PI" type: HIGHLIGHT
commit id: "VCFTOOLS_HET" type: HIGHLIGHT
checkout DeepVariant
commit id: "BCFTOOLS_CONCAT_GVCF" type: HIGHLIGHT
checkout BAM/CRAM
merge VCFtools
merge DeepVariant
commit id: "DUMPSOFTWAREVERSIONS" type: HIGHLIGHT
repo_description: Nextflow DSL2 pipeline to call variants on long read alignment.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为Sanger-tol的Variantcalling工作流画一个Git图，展示从BAM/CRAM输入到最终VCF产出的完整流程。主分支就叫BAM/CRAM，起点是START节点。
明白，主分支用BAM/CRAM。我注意到流程里有参考基因组处理，是不是需要一条Fasta分支？还有顺序上Fasta应该排在第4位？
对，Fasta分支先做SAMTOOLS_FAIDX索引。然后回到主分支做SAMPLESHEET_CHECK样本检查。接下来要分两条线处理AlignedReads和UnAlignedReads，顺序分别是3和2。

好的，Fasta分支和两条读取分支都建好了。UnAlignedReads这条线我按顺序放了SAMTOOLS_COLLATE、SAMTOOLS_FASTA，然后是BLAST_BLASTN比对，经过PACBIO_FILTER和PACBIO_SAMTOOLS_FILTER过滤，再到SAMTOOLS_FASTQ，最后MINIMAP2_ALIGN比对。这里有四个关键节点需要高亮：SAMTOOLS_MERGE_BY_SAMPLE 1、SAMTOOLS_STATS、SAMTOOLS_FLAGSTAT和SAMTOOLS_IDXSTATS。
UnAlignedReads处理完要合并回BAM/CRAM主分支。另外Fasta分支后面还要拆出SplitFasta（顺序5）做FASTA_SPLIT，然后连到DeepVariant分支（顺序6）。AlignedReads这边要先合并Fasta，再做SAMTOOLS_SORT和SAMTOOLS_MERGE_BY_SAMPLE 2。
AlignedReads合并Fasta之后，这条线最终也要合并回主分支对吧？然后主分支做SAMTOOLS_FILTER，再合并到DeepVariant进行变异检测？
没错，DeepVariant里做DEEPVARIANT调用，然后高亮显示BCFTOOLS_CONCAT_VCF。从这里要分出VCFtools分支（顺序7），做VCFTOOLS_SITE_PI和VCFTOOLS_HET两个统计，都要高亮。DeepVariant这边还要做BCFTOOLS_CONCAT_GVCF，也是高亮节点。
VCFtools分支和DeepVariant分支最后都合并回BAM/CRAM主分支，然后加上DUMPSOFTWAREVERSIONS节点，高亮显示。整个图的标题设为Sanger-tol/Variantcalling Workflow，commit标签字体用18px。
